subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter hath arrived and thy eloquent verses were perused. Thou hast spoken truly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه ات رسید و اشعار بلیغ قرائت گردید حق سخن داده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
